cronPageDescription: View every automated Agent task, or arrange a new one through an AI conversation.
cronComposerPlaceholder: Describe what you want done regularly
cronComposerLabel: Describe the task you want to arrange
cronComposerHint: Your request opens an AI conversation for confirmation. It is not enabled here directly.
cronRunForceConfirm: Task is paused. Run it anyway
cronEmptyGuide: Tell your Agent about the task you want to schedule
cronAttentionSummaryHint: Open task details to review the latest error
cronAllHealthyHint: There are no issues that need attention
cronTemplateSelectionHint: Choose a template, edit it, then confirm it in an AI conversation.
cronEmptyHeroTitle: What should NextClaw do for you regularly?
cronEmptyHeroDescription: Describe an outcome or start with a template. AI will confirm timing, scope, and how results should be delivered.
cronNoMatchingTasksHint: Try a different search or status filter.
cronDetailDescription: Review the task and its latest run. Return to its execution session to describe changes.
cronLatestRunHint: The system currently stores only the latest execution snapshot.
cronToggleHint: Paused tasks do not run automatically on schedule.
cronSessionAvailableAfterRun: A dedicated session is created after the task runs for the first time.
cronTemplateAiNewsDescription: Summarize AI product and research changes that affect real work.
cronTemplateAiNewsPrompt: Every morning at 8, summarize the most important AI product and research developments from the past 24 hours and include original sources.
cronTemplateWeeklyReviewDescription: Summarize progress, decisions, loose ends, and next priorities on Friday.
cronTemplateWeeklyReviewPrompt: Every Friday at 6 PM, summarize this project's progress, key decisions, open issues, and priorities for next week.
cronTemplateMeetingPrepDescription: Collect the agenda, material, open questions, and participant context.
cronTemplateMeetingPrepPrompt: Thirty minutes before each meeting, organize the agenda, related material, open questions, and anything I need to prepare.
cronTemplateLearningDescription: Create a short practice set aligned with the current learning goal.
cronTemplateLearningPrompt: Every evening at 8, create a 15-minute practice set based on what I have been learning recently.
cronTemplateCompetitorDescription: Check official updates and report only changes worth acting on.
cronTemplateCompetitorPrompt: Every Monday, check official announcements and release notes from major competitors and report only material changes that affect product decisions.
cronTemplateFamilyDescription: Remind you to contact important people at a suitable time.
cronTemplateFamilyPrompt: Every Sunday at 10 AM, remind me to contact my parents and recap anything from our last conversation that I should follow up on.
